zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund I Knyvett於大約1462年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir William Knyvett54歲，母親Jane Courtenay22歲。他於大約1484年與Eleanor Tyrrell在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年7月25日之前，埋葬在英國諾福爾可希爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund I Knyvett于大约1462年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir William Knyvett54岁，母亲Jane Courtenay22岁。他于大约1484年与Eleanor Tyrrell在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1504年7月25日之前，埋葬在英国諾福爾可希爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund I Knyvett was born about 1462, in England, his father, Sir William Knyvett, was 54 and his mother, Jane Courtenay, was 22. He married Eleanor Tyrrell about 1484, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 25 July 1504, and was buried in Hilborough, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund I Knyvett est né environ 1462, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Knyvett, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Jane Courtenay, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Tyrrell environ 1484, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 25 juillet 1504, et a été enterré à Hilborough, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund I Knyvett um 1462 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Knyvett 54 und seine Mutter Jane Courtenay 22. Er hat um 1484 in England Eleanor Tyrrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 25. Juli 1504 und wurde in Hilborough, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund I Knyvett è nato il circa 1462 nel England, il suo padre, Sir William Knyvett, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Jane Courtenay, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Tyrrell circa 1484, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 25 luglio 1504, e fu sepolto a Hilborough, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund I Knyvettが約1462年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Knyvettは54歳，母Jane Courtenayは22歳であった。約1484年にイギリスでEleanor Tyrrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年7月25日以前に死去し，イギリスノーフォルクヒルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund I Knyvett(이)가 대략 1462년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Knyvett(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Courtenay(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1484년 영국에서 Eleanor Tyrrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 7월 25일 이전 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 힐버루그h에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1462–before 25 July 1504: ойролцоогоор 1462 он–1504 оны Долоодугаар сарын 25–наас өмнө
mn.Edenham, Lincolnshire, England: Edenham, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Buckenham Castle, Wayland, Norfolk, Engl: Wayland, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund I Knyvett nasceu aproximadamente 1462, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Knyvett, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Jane Courtenay, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Tyrrell aproximadamente 1484, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 25 de julho de 1504, e foi sepultado em Hilborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund I Knyvett родился около 1462 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Knyvett было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Courtenay, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Tyrrell около 1484 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 25 июля 1504 г. и был похоронен в местности хилбороую, норфолк, Англия.

sm.about 1462–before 25 July 1504: e tusa o le 1462–a'e le'I oo le 25 Iulai 1504

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund I Knyvett nació aproximadamente 1462, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Knyvett, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Jane Courtenay, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor Tyrrell aproximadamente 1484, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 25 de julio de 1504, y fue sepultado en Hilborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
